---
title: "About"
---

Hello! My name is Ronit Kumar. I am an international transfer student from India, currently pursuing a major in Computer Science and a minor in Data Science.

My interest in computers started when I was very young. Overtime, that interest grew into a passion for technology. I enjoy exploring how computers work and how data can be used to answer meaningful questions.

I like playing video games, working out, and trying new food.
